title: senecio schultzii
intro: Senecio schultzii, also known as the Schultz's ragwort, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and relieving pain. Senecio schultzii is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions by traditional healers in South Africa for its medicinal uses.
